name: Greek Lamb & Orzo
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground lamb (beef can be substituted)
1 medium celery stalk, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lamb in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until no longer pink; drain.
2. Stir in tomatoes, celery, orzo, salt, and red pepper.
3. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer for about 12 minutes, stirring frequently, until tomato liquid is absorbed and orzo is tender.
5. Serve with yogurt and pita breads (Orzo is rice-shaped pasta).
